params.walletSwapMain: WalletSwapMain contract address on that chain.

params._initialChainIds: Chain IDs to register at deploy time (e.g. Sepolia, Base Sepolia, Lasna).
params._initialContracts: WalletSwapMain addresses for each initial chain (same-length array).

pay(uint256).details: Make sure to check the msg.sender.

params.amount: Amount owed due to reactive transactions and/or callbacks.

params.log: Data structure containing the information about the intercepted log record.

addChain(uint256,address).notice: Add a new chain after deployment. Immediately subscribes to its OrderInitiated events.

addChainOffline(uint256,address).notice: Add a new chain without calling the Reactive Network subscription service. Useful for unsupported chains or testing.

chainIds(uint256).notice: Array of active chain IDs (for iteration).

chains(uint256).notice: All registered chains, indexed by chainId.

contractToChainId(address).notice: Quick lookup: is a given contract address a registered WalletSwapMain?

coverDebt().notice: Automatically cover the outstanding debt to the system contract or callback proxy, provided the contract has sufficient funds.

getChainConfig(uint256).notice: Returns the config for a specific chain.

getRegisteredChains().notice: Returns all currently registered (active) chain IDs.

pay(uint256).notice: Method called by the system contract and/or proxies when payment is due.

react((uint256,address,uint256,uint256,u.notice: Entry point for handling new event notifications.

removeChain(uint256).notice: Remove a chain. Immediately unsubscribes from its events.

updateChainContract(uint256,address).notice: Swap the WalletSwapMain address for an existing chain (e.g. after redeployment).
